name: @call-it/subgraph
description: The Graph subgraph schema + stub mappings for Call It (Arbitrum Sepolia → Decentralized Network)

scripts.build: pnpm run prebuild && graph codegen && graph build
scripts.deploy:sepolia:dry-run: graph build && echo 'Dry-run: studio deploy not executed without SUBGRAPH_STUDIO_DEPLOY_KEY'
scripts.lint: echo 'No lint configured for subgraph yet'
